decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (corridor_webster-ave-bronx) is the closest matching registry record — it already lists the source 2013_01_webster_sbs_newsletter and the cited evidence block p001_c0007 in its source_ids and evidence_refs. The observation resolves to its own base_record_id. No other registry record contains this 2013 source or matches more closely. Per identity rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, decision is 'new' (the observation already resolves to that id).
